description.en:
Converts all in-game fill amounts to US imperial units — no more mental math.
WHAT IT CONVERTS: - Grain crops (wheat, corn, soybeans, barley, etc.) → Bushels (bu) using USDA standard weights - Forages, hay, straw, silage, root vegetables → US Short Tons (ton) - Fuel, water, milk, and all other liquids → US Gallons (gal) - Operational fluids (AdBlue, engine oil, coolant) → Hidden, as intended
WHERE IT WORKS: - Vehicle HUD fill bars - Grain silo and placeable storage popups - Bale info displays
MODDED MAPS & FILL TYPES: Known fill types from popular mod packs are included. Unknown modded fill types are auto-detected by density — grains show as bushels, heavy materials as tons, liquids as gallons.
Multiplayer compatible.
